title: Grounding Salt Bath
intention: Release emotional tension and return to the body
instructions: Add two handfuls of sea salt and a few drops of lavender.
Sit in silence, observe your breathing, and speak your intention.
notes: Recommend after a Meaning Block about processing or overthinking.
human_text: Take a grounding salt bath to release emotional tension and return to your body. Prepare water at body temperature (37–38°C), add two handfuls of sea salt and a few drops of lavender. Sit in silence, observe your breathing, and speak your intention. This works well after moments of overthinking or intense processing.

title: Solar Walk Intent
instructions: Walk briskly for five minutes while counting breaths.
Pause to write one goal you are supporting today.
Repeat "Om Ram" three times and feel warmth in the chest.
notes: Pairs with Tarot Flow recommendations about action.
human_text: Take a solar walk to restore motivation and clarity. Walk briskly for five minutes while counting breaths, then pause to write one goal you're supporting today. Repeat "Om Ram" three times and feel warmth in your chest. This pairs well with recommendations about taking action.
